idea-plugin.name: Offensive360 SAST
idea-plugin.description:
Offensive360 SAST for IntelliJ IDEA and Android Studio -- scan your application code for vulnerabilities directly from the IDE.
Features: - Direct source code analysis with token-based authentication - Git repository scanning support - Tabbed results panel with severity-coded findings - Tabbed detail view (Details / How to Fix / References) for each finding - Double-click navigation to vulnerable source lines - Built-in fix guidance from the vulnerability knowledge base - CWE reference links for each vulnerability type - Retry with exponential backoff for reliable scanning - Large codebase support (1 GB+) with 4-hour timeout

action.description: Scan the current project for vulnerabilities with Offensive 360 SAST
Scan a Git repository for vulnerabilities

idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.1.16

  • Fixed: clicking a finding in a sorted results table now navigates to the correct file and line

1.1.15

  • KeepInvisibleAndDeletePostScan=True: scans leave no trace on the dashboard
  • Inline ExternalScan results (no post-scan /LangaugeScanResult fetch)
  • Retry with exponential backoff (0/15/30/60/120/240s) for reliability
  • 4-hour read/write timeout for very large projects
  • Base64 decode for code snippets from the server
  • File exclusions aligned with VS and Android Studio plugins
  • 50MB per-file size cap and backup folder pattern exclusion
  • Tabbed detail view: Details / How to Fix / References
  • CWE reference links extracted from vulnerability data
  • Human-readable titles in the findings table
  • Check for Updates action in the Tools menu
  • Update checker uses offensive360/intellij GitHub releases

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Token-based authentication with O360 server
  • Project and Git repository scanning
  • Real-time vulnerability annotations
